title: Civmec Grad Program
description:

Exposure to diverse, large‑scale projects✅

End‑to‑end insight across core business functions✅
A supportive, inclusive and future‑focused workplace ✅

title: Volatility Lab
description:
Join Optiver's Volatility Lab to discover how volatility drives financial markets, and learn how to build your own model to forecast US stock movements, using maths, data and tech.
If you’re curious about a career in trading, research, or tech, this is your chance to experience it first-hand.
Bring your laptop (basic Python skills required).
